events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario. Scenario: field review of Concrete placement shows expected unit in intended location. Nameplates and orientation marks readable, housing and adjacent work no damage, item matches referenced detail for this stage. Stage rough-complete. Task identify component/material/condition. We need decision pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since no defects, decision pass. Risk low. Work stage rough-complete. Component_conditions empty. Percent complete maybe 80? Value 0. Sound_source etc default empty string/0. Findings none. Actions none maybe. Rationale. References ACI 301, ACI 304. Need valid JSON. Ensure fields types: order array of strings, workable array of strings. sound_source string. event_time number. rate number. confidence number. Let's set confidence 0.95. percent_complete maybe 85. value 0. component_conditions empty list. findings empty list. actions empty list. references ["ACI 301", "ACI 304"].
